title: On the Rademacher Complexity of GNNs: Unifying Expressivity and Geometry

title: HOPSE: Scalable Higher-Order Positional and Structural Encoder for Combinatorial Representations
authors_display: G. Bernardez, M. Montagna, L. Van Langendonck, M. Carrasco, A. Akbari, L. Cornelis, M. Papillon, P. Barlet-Ros, N. Miolane, and L. Telyatnikov

title: Graph Homomorphism Distortion: A Metric to Distinguish Them All and in the Latent Space Bind Them
tldr: We propose a metric that captures both features and struture in attributed graphs.

title: Diversity Curves for Graph Representation Learning
tldr: We propose diversity curves, novel graph-level representations for unsupervised tasks that track the structural diversity, namely the metric space spread, of graphs across coarsening levels obtained through edge contractions.

title: No Triangulation Without Representation: Generalization in Topological Deep Learning
authors_display: J. S. Schmidt✱, M. Carrasco✱, E. Röell, G. Wolf, N. Blaser†, and B. Rieck†
tldr: We find topological generalization is lacking in deep learning and present an evaluation framework to test for it.
